name: chrX_Xq28_G6PD_dispersed_SD
description: Xq28 region containing G6PD (glucose-6-phosphate dehydrogenase) plus FLNA, EMD, F8 (cross-ref). G6PD lies in a small SD cluster sharing fragments with autosomal pseudogenes; clinically the most polymorphic enzyme locus in humans (>400 variants worldwide).

architecture.internal_structure: Short ~5 kb SD fragments around G6PD; flanked by FLNA, EMD, F8 in the Xq28 LCR-rich tail.

related_diseases: FLNA-related disorders (periventricular nodular heterotopia, OPD spectrum)
